reportMeta.title: QA Engineering Job Search Report
reportMeta.subtitle: Senior Quality Engineer  |  Tier-1 Tech  |  Amazon Background
reportMeta.candidateProfile: Senior QA Engineer  |  10+ years  |  Amazon / Tier-1 Tech  |  Java, Selenium, Appium  |  Remote US
reportMeta.candidateNote: Confidential — Senior QA Engineer Job Search

hardRequirements.value: $120,000 base minimum. If salary not listed, include if all other criteria met.
100% Remote (US) or Hybrid within Denver metro area.
Must include keywords: Quality, Test, QAE, SDET, or QA.
Posting must be currently accepting applications. Apply link verified — 404/error page = excluded.

softCriteria.definition: No mass layoffs in the past 12 months. Prefer established or growing companies.
Glassdoor / sentiment rating of 4.0 or higher. High scores for autonomy and management quality.
Engineering culture that values or allows AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Cline, Kiro, Cursor, Copilot).
Positive sentiment for sustainable hours and healthy team culture. Avoid burnout-flagged companies.

searchCriteria.candidateRolePreferences:
The candidate is a Senior QA Engineer with 10 years of Tier-1 tech experience at Amazon, specializing in end-to-end quality strategy and customer advocacy for distributed, customer-facing systems. The core strength is partnering with engineering teams to drive quality upstream — translating ambiguous requirements into actionable test plans, influencing product decisions early, and making quality a shared engineering value.

Priority is given to roles centered on test planning, quality strategy, and cross-functional collaboration with engineering and product teams. The candidate is language-agnostic with a strong technical foundation (Java, Selenium, Appium) and a track record of adopting new stacks and AI-assisted tools. Automation capability is a complement to strategic work, not the primary focus. Roles limited to execution-only test case running are excluded.

roles.title: AI Engineer, Quality (Evals)
roles.classification: Mixed — AI Evaluation System Design + Quality Strategy
roles.summary: Fieldguide is an AI-native platform for audit and advisory, automating audit workflows for accounting and advisory firms. The AI Engineer, Quality (Evals) role sits at the intersection of ML engineering and quality strategy — designing and running evaluation frameworks for AI-generated outputs. This is a strategic quality role with significant cross-functional influence over product quality.

culture: Glassdoor 4.5/5; high marks for management quality and autonomy

wlb: Positive WLB sentiment in Glassdoor reviews; no burnout flags
